text:
wxs         2009-12-01 15:25:11 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Added files:
    devel/rubygem-configuration Makefile distinfo pkg-descr 
  Log:
  Ruby configuration gem provides a mechanism
  for configuring ruby programs with ruby
  configuration files.
  
  WWW: http://rubyforge.org/projects/codeforpeople/
  
  PR:             ports/140340
  Submitted by:   Ryan Steinmetz <rpsfa@rit.edu>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.1       +19 -0     ports/devel/rubygem-configuration/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/devel/rubygem-configuration/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +5 -0      ports/devel/rubygem-configuration/pkg-descr (new)
